name: Alan Raph
description: American trombonist, composer, arranger, and conductor (1933–2023)
abstract: Alan Raph (July 3, 1933 – December 8, 2023) was an American bass trombonist, composer, arranger, and conductor who founded and conducted the Danbury Brass Band. He recorded with many well-known musicians including Quincy Jones, Philip Glass, Peter Nero, John Pizzarelli and Bob Brookmeyer for television, movies, and ballet.

interviews.title: Alan Raph interviewed by Monk Rowe, Danbury, Connecticut, November 20, 2001

works.t: Trio for Trumpet, Trombone, and Piano
